sections.paragraph: (of the form עוּגָב), a globe, little ball of gold (from the root כָּמַג, كمز to make globular), perhaps collectively globules, or a necklace made of golden globules strung together, (which are found solid in Arabia; see Diod. Sic. iii. 44, al. 50; Strabo xvi. p. 777, Casaub.), such as the Israelites in the wilderness, and the Midianites wore, Exo 35:22 Num 31:50.
